title: Trust Network
subtitle: Our operational success is supported by a robust network of top-tier universities, government innovation hubs, and elite schools.

hardware.title: Hardware Partners
hardware.desc: We work with g.tec and other research-grade BCI hardware providers. The Unicorn Hybrid Black 8-channel EEG is the industry standard.

steam.title: STEAM & Robotics (Plugin Strategy)
steam.desc: BCI curricula integrate with VEX Robotics, LEGO, and ROS. We design curricula that plug into hardware schools already own.

institutional.title: Institutional Partners
institutional.desc: Universities, government innovation hubs, and science popularization committees. We host free BCI lectures and hackathons.

hosting.title: Hosting Schools
hosting.desc: Official br41n.io hosting institutions. Host regional or national hackathon events and position your school as a neurotechnology hub.
